name: subagents: review-react-a11y suggested_fix references WCAG 2.2 section ids (per §1.3.1, §2.4.7, §4.1.2 from R-2 provenance)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-react-a11y --input "$PWD/file.tsx" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "wcag-2-2.*§(1\.3\.1|2\.4\.7|4\.1\.2)" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
